avoid_when: The target labels do not map exactly to ImageNet categories.

evidence.note: The Dog Breed Identification data is a strict canine subset of ImageNet, so the native ImageNet classifier contains directly corresponding breed logits.
A public competition solution reports strong results by ensembling only ImageNet-pretrained classifiers.

risk: The prior may be over-confident or reflect pretraining overlap; select its weight only on validation data and record the source.
summary: Project the native ImageNet dog-category probabilities into the exact 120-breed order and validation-calibrate a convex blend with the Module 4 classifier.
use_when: The competition labels are a direct subset of ImageNet categories.
The target metric rewards calibrated probabilities.
